__description: AI-to-human action items for SQL coordination_tasks table (CoordinationTask ORM). These are tasks the AI flags for human specialists. target_agent must be one of: RiskManager, Pricing, Content. v1.1 adds signal_count and issue_type for deduplication.

tasks.instruction: <string: specific, actionable instruction for the human agent — include numbers and deadlines where relevant>
tasks.signal_count: <int: number of signals (reviews/chats) merged into this task, default 1>
